company.name: Tongal
company.description: Creator-powered production platform with 160,000+ creators across 175 countries. Broadcast-quality video, animation, and social content. Faster than agencies, lower cost, clients own everything.
uvp: 10-30 creative submissions per project vs 2-3 from agencies

dtc_ecommerce.metric: Cut CPA by 35% with creator-driven testimonial campaign, 50M+ impressions

cpg_fb.metric: Broadcast quality social content through creator community

retail.metric: Broadcast quality video and social content

health_wellness.metric: Cut CPA by 35%, 50M+ impressions with testimonial campaign

copy_rules.structure_email1: Personalized hook → Social proof (brand names + metric) → Key differentiator → Soft CTA
copy_rules.structure_email2: Industry angle on video → Different case study + 'one team, you own everything' → CTA
copy_rules.subject_line: Max 3 words, company name Capitalized, other words lowercase, NO '{Company} + video production' pattern
copy_rules.cta_email2: Would it make sense to share a few relevant samples?
copy_rules.ps_line: If this isn't a fit, please let me know and I'll stop reaching out.
copy_rules.no_signature: Email body ends at CTA/PS. Signature handled by {SENDER_EMAIL_SIGNATURE}

what_works.proof: Lead with brand names, not product description

what_doesnt_work.subject_lines: '{Company} + video production' is formulaic — needs variety
what_doesnt_work.case_studies: Same 3 names for every industry — must match vertical
what_doesnt_work.long_copy: 200+ word emails get 2% reply rate with 8.6% bounce
what_doesnt_work.stale_hooks: 'Recently started as...' often wrong — use company-level observations
